review_body_text: I am hardworking person. Focus more on career development. I maintain good reputation and KPI in CIMB. I gain many experience meet people and handle their banking request. Any new policy and procedure or new bank product I will be eager to know and learn and share with the colleague. Work close with audit compliance to minimise the fault. Most hardest role in my job multi-tasking for more than 2 job function at one time. I completed my Degree and Masters and ask for promotion but unfortunately the bank don't have any vacancy to promote me. I really appreciate Cimb because given me job offer that really help me lot in term of finance to continue my studies
Overall a good banking group despite the red tape and politics. Perhaps better suited to someone who would enjoy a well structured work-place.
Routine job daily. System enhancement from time to time. Management based on fovouritism for promotion. Good co-worker and not required to work during weekend unless volume high.
pros_text: Manage to learn many things - survival

review_body_text: i need find people who interest to make loan with me. i learn how to be brave when talk with others.i have a good group who have kind heart and can share everything about work.the hardest part is when i need to go the place that i'll never go and i need to give all flyers to whom i never know.the enjoyable part is i can go for holiday while working
Everyday have to overtime because the job is on project based & my team have to support automation support team. If they delay their work we have to stay and support them with documents

review_title: Used to be a star, not doing so well
review_body_text: Having a recent major layoff. Enjoyed a lot of initial deals from connections (Nazir) however slowing down as the country's economic / development activity slows down. Was quite a competitive (cut-throat) work culture when I was there

review_title: Good working place to learned about financial market.
review_body_text: Been with the company for more than 15 years has taught me on how to handle ad-hoc and private & confidential matters in professional manner. Has taught me how to handle stress and time management.

I was placed in the compliance department and my typical day at work is often to review prospectus as well as transaction to ensure that everything complies with the rules and regulations set out by regulators. Requires extreme concentration.

- have to answer all inbound calls - learned how to deal with customers - managements is good and review our increments every year - friend is superb - the hardest jobs is getting complaints from customer - it's enjoyable when received compliments letter from customers
pros_text: a lot of activities through out year

review_body_text: This place was great start to work. Long working hours with no tolerate. I learned a lot on how to handle my time in busy timelines.

review_title: i love work there and learn so many experiance
review_body_text: • Sales (credit card and cashliteprograme). • Handling system company such as IVR system and others. • Highly skilled in explain product knowledge to customer over the phone. • Hands on experience in identifying and developing succesful business relationships. • Excelent in follow up document and strong negotiating with customer. • Confidently communicate with customers.

review_title: Challenging and competitive environment that promotes steep learning curve.
review_body_text: Challenging and competitive environment that promotes steep learning curve. Requires good multi-tasking skills while not compromising on work quality. Ability to work independently and be resourceful under tight deadline.
Have spent 20 years in this prestigious ASEAN well known regional bank. A great working place with multiracial co-workers. A supportive management towards well being of it's employees.

review_title: A good place to start a career
review_body_text: friendly,supportive and knowlegable colleague. I learned about compliance of Bank Negara Malaysia(BNM), AMLATFA, IFSA and banking policies and management skills. handling day to day banking operation in details and based on policies that have been stated. im exposed to new experiences that required new level of management skills and knowledge. at the same time, i also learnt to carry out sales for banking/finacial products.

Wonderfull department where workers can learn more about banking system, managements also help us on time when we need and co-workers very helpful. The hardest part of the job difficult to learn about the system for 1st time user but once we managed it's easier. The most enjoyable things in this departments every week got meeting amoung the team with managers to get to know how the staff handling the work every week with any problem or not.

I came to work early than working time. The working period is basically from 8.30 A.M until 5.30 P.M. I had my breakfast at the workplace usually. Literally, I learned something new at the work place every week. I learned about presentation skills, time management, work culture, and the workers different personality. The access card for everyday used need several days for it to be done. The approval for internet access, printing and scanning security slow and required days to be approved and settled. The management kind of blurry and they did not introduce new worker to the existing employees in another department, only among their department and if they have to. Everyone need to know their own colleagues in order to have better working environment. There are friendly co-workers and others rather be in their clique. The hardest part of the job is that there are no work to be done for that particular day, I think a worker must accomplish or contribute something on that day, then he is worthy on receiving the paycheck, because of the work that he had done. The most enjoyable part of the job was when I know what I am doing and receiving work from supervisors or other superiors. This is only the point of view of an intern.
cons_text: Solemn working culture especially to new employee

review_body_text: Day will be basically busy as the application will be escalated randomly for executives to process. At the same time have to attend to Sales staffs on enquiries. However, i'm glad that this kind of working environment has actually taught me do multitasking at a time. Beside, I have improved my analytical and decision making skills as well. Moreover, we do have our monthly meetings and birthday celebrations once in a month which actually creates a positive bond between everyone.

review_title: As usual, work has to be completed on a daily basis.
review_body_text: I am only here on a temporary basis, replacing the secretary who is on maternity leave. Nice evironment and office workspace. Location is good as access to public transport. As for lunch , convenient, as walking distance to KL Sentral Good working colleagueas.
An intensive analysis of financial statements help in improving my skills and knowledge. Persistency is the key to success in this job.

Good for corporate culture in nurturing the governance of a banking institution. I learn about banking procedure, charges, basic loan calculation, banks product, saving and current account maintenance, check everyday balance and so on
